OpenClaw Installation & Configuration on Linux

Posted on March 1, 2026, by Yuanpeng Zhang

Here in this post, I am noting down the installation and configuration for OpenClaw. First, we follow the installation instructions here and carefully go through each step. Below is presented the whole input/output during my installation, where all the API keys and configuration tokens, etc. are omitted.

  рҹҰһ OpenClaw Installer
  Hot reload for config, cold sweat for deploys.

вң“ Detected: linux

Install plan
OS: linux
Install method: npm
Requested version: latest

[1/3] Preparing environment
В· Node.js not found, installing it now
В· Installing Node.js via NodeSource
В· Installing Linux build tools (make/g++/cmake/python3)
вң“ Build tools installed
вң“ Node.js v22 installed
В· Active Node.js: v22.22.0 (/usr/bin/node)
В· Active npm: 10.9.4 (/usr/bin/npm)

[2/3] Installing OpenClaw
вң“ Git already installed
В· Configuring npm for user-local installs
вң“ npm configured for user installs
В· Installing OpenClaw v2026.2.26
вң“ OpenClaw npm package installed
вң“ OpenClaw installed

[3/3] Finalizing setup

! PATH missing npm global bin dir: /home/ubuntu/.npm-global/bin
  This can make openclaw show as "command not found" in new terminals.
  Fix (zsh: ~/.zshrc, bash: ~/.bashrc):
    export PATH="/home/ubuntu/.npm-global/bin:$PATH"

рҹҰһ OpenClaw installed successfully (2026.2.26)!
Settled in. Time to automate your life whether you're ready or not.

В· Starting setup


рҹҰһ OpenClaw 2026.2.26 (bc50708) вҖ” curl for conversations.

в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„в–„
в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–„в–„в–„в–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–„в–„в–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–„в–„в–„в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Җв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–„в–„в–Җв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–„в–„в–Җв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳ
в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Җв–Җв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–„в–„в–„в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Җв–Җв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳ
в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Җв–Җв–Җв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Җв–Җв–Җв–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–„в–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Җв–Җв–„в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Җв–Җв–‘в–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–‘в–Ҳв–Ҳв–„в–Җв–„в–Җв–„в–Ҳв–Ҳ
в–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җв–Җ
                  рҹҰһ OPENCLAW рҹҰһ

в”Ң  OpenClaw onboarding
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Security в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•®
в”Ӯ                                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Security warning вҖ” please read.                                                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  OpenClaw is a hobby project and still in beta. Expect sharp edges.                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  By default, OpenClaw is a personal agent: one trusted operator boundary.                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  This bot can read files and run actions if tools are enabled.                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  A bad prompt can trick it into doing unsafe things.                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  OpenClaw is not a hostile multi-tenant boundary by default.                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  If multiple users can message one tool-enabled agent, they share that delegated tool      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  authority.                                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  If youвҖҷre not comfortable with security hardening and access control, donвҖҷt run           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  OpenClaw.                                                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Ask someone experienced to help before enabling tools or exposing it to the internet.     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Recommended baseline:                                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Pairing/allowlists + mention gating.                                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Multi-user/shared inbox: split trust boundaries (separate gateway/credentials, ideally  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    separate OS users/hosts).                                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Sandbox + least-privilege tools.                                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Shared inboxes: isolate DM sessions (`session.dmScope: per-channel-peer`) and keep      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    tool access minimal.                                                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Keep secrets out of the agentвҖҷs reachable filesystem.                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Use the strongest available model for any bot with tools or untrusted inboxes.          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Run regularly:                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  openclaw security audit --deep                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  openclaw security audit --fix                                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Must read: https://docs.openclaw.ai/gateway/security                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                            в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  I understand this is personal-by-default and shared/multi-user use requires lock-down. Continue?
в”Ӯ  Yes
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Onboarding mode
в”Ӯ  Manual
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  What do you want to set up?
в”Ӯ  Local gateway (this machine)
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Workspace directory
в”Ӯ  /home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Model/auth provider
в”Ӯ  Anthropic
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Anthropic auth method
в”Ӯ  Anthropic API key
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  How do you want to provide this API key?
в”Ӯ  Paste API key now
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Enter Anthropic API key
в”Ӯ  <paste_api_key_here>
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Default model
в”Ӯ  Keep current (anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6)
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Gateway port
в”Ӯ  18789
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Gateway bind
в”Ӯ  Loopback (127.0.0.1)
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Gateway auth
в”Ӯ  Token
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Tailscale exposure
в”Ӯ  Off
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Gateway token (blank to generate)
в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Channel status в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•®
в”Ӯ                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Telegram: needs token                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  WhatsApp (default): not linked             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Discord: needs token                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Slack: needs tokens                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Signal: needs setup                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  signal-cli: missing (signal-cli)           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  iMessage: needs setup                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  imsg: missing (imsg)                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  IRC: not configured                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Google Chat: not configured                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Feishu: install plugin to enable           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Google Chat: install plugin to enable      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Nostr: install plugin to enable            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Microsoft Teams: install plugin to enable  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Mattermost: install plugin to enable       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Nextcloud Talk: install plugin to enable   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Matrix: install plugin to enable           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  BlueBubbles: install plugin to enable      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  LINE: install plugin to enable             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Zalo: install plugin to enable             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Zalo Personal: install plugin to enable    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Synology Chat: install plugin to enable    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Tlon: install plugin to enable             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                             в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Configure chat channels now?
в”Ӯ  Yes
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  How channels work в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•®
в”Ӯ                                                                                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  DM security: default is pairing; unknown DMs get a pairing code.                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Approve with: openclaw pairing approve <channel> <code>                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Public DMs require dmPolicy="open" + allowFrom=["*"].                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Multi-user DMs: run: openclaw config set session.dmScope "per-channel-peer" (or          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  "per-account-channel-peer" for multi-account channels) to isolate sessions.              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Docs: channels/pairing              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Telegram: simplest way to get started вҖ” register a bot with @BotFather and get going.    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  WhatsApp: works with your own number; recommend a separate phone + eSIM.                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Discord: very well supported right now.                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  IRC: classic IRC networks with DM/channel routing and pairing controls.                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Google Chat: Google Workspace Chat app with HTTP webhook.                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Slack: supported (Socket Mode).                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Signal: signal-cli linked device; more setup (David Reagans: "Hop on Discord.").         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  iMessage: this is still a work in progress.                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Feishu: йЈһд№Ұ/Lark enterprise messaging with doc/wiki/drive tools.                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Nostr: Decentralized protocol; encrypted DMs via NIP-04.                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Microsoft Teams: Bot Framework; enterprise support.                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Mattermost: self-hosted Slack-style chat; install the plugin to enable.                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Nextcloud Talk: Self-hosted chat via Nextcloud Talk webhook bots.                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Matrix: open protocol; install the plugin to enable.                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  BlueBubbles: iMessage via the BlueBubbles mac app + REST API.                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  LINE: LINE Messaging API bot for Japan/Taiwan/Thailand markets.                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Zalo: Vietnam-focused messaging platform with Bot API.                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Zalo Personal: Zalo personal account via QR code login.                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Synology Chat: Connect your Synology NAS Chat to OpenClaw with full agent capabilities.  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Tlon: decentralized messaging on Urbit; install the plugin to enable.                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                           в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Select a channel
в”Ӯ  Slack (Socket Mode)
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Slack bot display name (used for manifest)
в”Ӯ  OpenClaw
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Slack socket mode tokens в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•®
в”Ӯ                                                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  1) Slack API вҶ’ Create App вҶ’ From scratch                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  2) Add Socket Mode + enable it to get the app-level token (xapp-...)  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  3) OAuth & Permissions вҶ’ install app to workspace (xoxb- bot token)   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  4) Enable Event Subscriptions (socket) for message events             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  5) App Home вҶ’ enable the Messages tab for DMs                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Tip: set SLACK_BOT_TOKEN + SLACK_APP_TOKEN in your env.               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Docs: slack                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Manifest (JSON):                                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  {                                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    "display_information": {                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      "name": "OpenClaw",                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      "description": "OpenClaw connector for OpenClaw"                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    },                                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    "features": {                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      "bot_user": {                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ        "display_name": "OpenClaw",                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ        "always_online": false                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      },                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      "app_home": {                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ        "messages_tab_enabled": true,                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ        "messages_tab_read_only_enabled": false                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      },                                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      "slash_commands": [                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ        {                                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "command": "/openclaw",                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "description": "Send a message to OpenClaw",                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "should_escape": false                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ        }                                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      ]                                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    },                                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    "oauth_config": {                                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      "scopes": {                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ        "bot": [                                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "chat:write",                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "channels:history",                                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "channels:read",                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "groups:history",                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "im:history",                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "mpim:history",                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "users:read",                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "app_mentions:read",                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "reactions:read",                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "reactions:write",                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "pins:read",                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "pins:write",                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "emoji:read",                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "commands",                                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "files:read",                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "files:write"                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ        ]                                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      }                                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    },                                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    "settings": {                                                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      "socket_mode_enabled": true,                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      "event_subscriptions": {                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ        "bot_events": [                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "app_mention",                                                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "message.channels",                                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "message.groups",                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "message.im",                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "message.mpim",                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "reaction_added",                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "reaction_removed",                                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "member_joined_channel",                                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "member_left_channel",                                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "channel_rename",                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "pin_added",                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          "pin_removed"                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ        ]                                                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      }                                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    }                                                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  }                                                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                        в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Enter Slack bot token (xoxb-...)
в”Ӯ  <paste_api_key_here>
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Enter Slack app token (xapp-...)
в”Ӯ  <paste_api_key_here>
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Configure Slack channels access?
в”Ӯ  Yes
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Slack channels access
в”Ӯ  Allowlist (recommended)
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Slack channels allowlist (comma-separated)
в”Ӯ  zyp-agent
в”Ӯ

в—Ү  Homebrew recommended в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•®
в”Ӯ                                                                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Many skill dependencies are shipped via Homebrew.                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Without brew, you'll need to build from source or download releases manually.  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                 в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ

в—Ү  Homebrew install в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•®

в”Ӯ  Run:                                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  /bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/HEAD/install.sh)"  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                        в”Ӯ

в—Ү  Hooks в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•®
в”Ӯ                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Hooks let you automate actions when agent commands are issued.          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Example: Save session context to memory when you issue /new or /reset.  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Learn more: https://docs.openclaw.ai/automation/hooks                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Enable hooks?
в”Ӯ  рҹ“қ command-logger, рҹ’ҫ session-memory
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Hooks Configured в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•®
в”Ӯ                                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Enabled 2 hooks: session-memory, command-logger  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  You can manage hooks later with:                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    openclaw hooks list                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    openclaw hooks enable <name>                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    openclaw hooks disable <name>                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                   в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ

в—Ү  Systemd в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•®
в”Ӯ                                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Linux installs use a systemd user service by default. Without lingering, systemd stops  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  the user session on logout/idle and kills the Gateway.                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Enabling lingering now (may require sudo; writes /var/lib/systemd/linger).              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                          в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ
в”Ӯ

в—Ү  Start TUI (best option!) в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•®
в”Ӯ                                                            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  This is the defining action that makes your agent you.    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Please take your time.                                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  The more you tell it, the better the experience will be.  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  We will send: "Wake up, my friend!"                       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                            в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  Token в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•®
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Gateway token: shared auth for the Gateway + Control UI.                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Stored in: ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json (gateway.auth.token) or OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN.   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  View token: openclaw config get gateway.auth.token                                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Generate token: openclaw doctor --generate-gateway-token                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Web UI stores a copy in this browser's localStorage (openclaw.control.settings.v1).    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  Open the dashboard anytime: openclaw dashboard --no-open                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  If prompted: paste the token into Control UI settings (or use the tokenized dashboard  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  URL).                                                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                                         в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ
в”Ӯ
в—Ү  How do you want to hatch your bot?
в”Ӯ  Hatch in TUI (recommended)
 openclaw tui - ws://127.0.0.1:18789 - agent main - session main

 session agent:main:main


 Wake up, my friend!


 Hey! Good to meet you. I just came online вҖ” fresh start, blank slate, no memory yet.

 Looks like we haven't been introduced. So let's fix that.

 Who am I? That's kind of up to us. I need a name, a vibe, maybe an emoji. I have some ideas if you want suggestions, or you can just tell me what feels right.

 And who are you? What should I call you?

N.B. I was installing OpenClaw on my Linux server so actually the answer to the question Show Homebrew install command? should be No but the initial answer I gave during the installation is Yes as shown above. This turns out to be fine вҖ“ just some installation failure while trying installing those brew relevant Skills. For the API keys configurations for various tools/Skills, most of them are straightforward to obtain. The only one that needs a special mention here is the Notion API key. To get it, we need to go to https://www.notion.so/profile/integrations/public and then go to Internal integration under Build (see the left-hand side items in the page) and create a new integration there.

After the successful installation, the web UI is accessible from http://localhost:18789. Here, I am using nginx + Cloudflare for the secure connection. Refer to the instructions in Ref. [1-3] for the setup. In my case, after the configuration, the web UI can be accessed via htts://openclaw.iris-home.net. First time visiting the web UI, we are expected to see some errors on the web interface saying the Status is Offline. This is probably because we havenвҖҷt set up the Gateway Token. To obtain the token, we can refer to the Control UI session in the installation process as presented above. Or, on terminal, we can do openclaw dashboard --no-open to see the token. Then we go to the web UI and paste the token in Gateway Token, followed by clicking on the Connect button. If error occurs, we can go to the OpenClaw configuration file located at ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json and look for allowedOrigins under the gateway/controlUI session. Then we can put in the domain like below,

...
  "gateway": {
    "port": 18789,
    "mode": "local",
    "bind": "loopback",
    "controlUi": {
      "allowedOrigins": [
        "http://localhost:18789",
        "https://openclaw.iris-2020.us"
      ]
    },
...

After making the change, we run openclaw gateway restart to restart the OpenClaw gateway. Now going back to the web UI, we should see something different вҖ“ still there is expected error message but the message should now specify how we should move forward. Fundamentally, this is the security mechanism implemented with OpenClaw вҖ“ as we will notice, there is no login mechanism coming with the web UI so there has to be a security mechanism in place to prevent unauthorized access to the web UI. So, every time we try a new browser to get access to the web UI, we are expected to see the same error message telling us what to do [5]. Basically, a fresh new access to the web UI will trigger a request to the server and on the server side, we can run openclaw devices list on the terminal to see the request. Then we can copy the request ID from the table (see the first column from the left) and run openclaw devices approve [here_we_put_down_the_request_id_without_the_square_bracket]. Now going back to the web UI, we should see that everything is OK.

During the installation, we were asked to set up channels (Slack, iMessage, etc.) for communicating with OpenClaw. I am using Slack here. To set up the Slack connection, we would need the app and bot API keys. Here we can follow the steps as following for the setup. First, go to api.slack.com/apps and click вҖңCreate New AppвҖқ вҶ’ вҖңFrom scratchвҖқ, and then give it a name and select the workspace for the app. OpenClaw supports two modes for the Slack connection and here I am going with the Socket Mode. Go to Socket Mode in the Slack api page and enable the socket mode by clicking on the switch. Then we need to give it a name and confirm to bring up the API key window where we can copy the API key вҖ“ this is the app API needed by OpenClaw. Then we go to OAuth & Permissions, and in the Scopes session, select the Bot Token Scopes, including chat:write, channels:history, channels:read, im:write, im:history, im:read, users:read, reactions:read, reactions:write, files:read, files:write, etc. Then go to the OAuth Tokens session in the page to install the app to the workspace and get the xoxb-... Bot Token вҖ“ this is the bot API required by OpenClaw. Finally, we need to go to Event Subscriptions in the Slack api page and add the following events subscription in the Subscribe to bot events session, app_mention, message.channels, message.groups, message.im, message.mpim. In principle, we should do this Slack setup before installing OpenClaw so when asked during the installation we can directly put in the required API keys. However in practice, even we do this, initially, it is possible the Slack integration would not work. In that case, we just follow the steps here for the Slack setup and obtain the app and bot API keys. Then, we can edit the OpenClaw configuration file (again, located at ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json on the server) and edit the channels session to be like this,

...
  "channels": {
    "slack": {
      "mode": "socket",
      "webhookPath": "/slack/events",
      "enabled": true,
      "botToken": "xoxb-......",
      "appToken": "xapp-......",
      "userTokenReadOnly": true,
      "allowBots": true,
      "groupPolicy": "allowlist",
      "streaming": "partial",
      "nativeStreaming": true,
      "channels": {
        "zyp-agent": {
          "enabled": true,
          "allow": true,
          "requireMention": false,
          "allowBots": true
        }
      }
    }
  },
...

where zyp-agent is my Slack channel name to incorporate the OpenClaw app (this is the name I gave for the app) we just created.


References

[1] https://iris2020.net/2023-12-25-vps_docker_services/

[2] https://iris2020.net/2025-08-18-cloudcone_setup/

[3] https://iris2020.net/2024-11-03-n8n_notion_slack_workflow/

[4] https://www.reddit.com/r/clawdbot/comments/1qrwovq/unauthorized_gateway/

[5] https://docs.openclaw.ai/web/control-ui
